ConstructorArguments: Returns a hash to be used when loading/saving. We use this to determine if the resource has changed. By default we serialize the generator to a json string and return the CRC64 of that value. You can override this in your generator if you need to make it faster, or ignore some stuff.

Documentation.Summary:
Returns a hash to be used when loading/saving. We use this to determine if the resource has changed.
By default we serialize the generator to a json string and return the CRC64 of that value. You can
override this in your generator if you need to make it faster, or ignore some stuff.
